question_text: Which of the following factors does NOT affect the weight of an object on Earth?

options.label: C
options.text: The gravitational field strength at that location

explanation: Weight is calculated using the formula W = m × g, where m is mass and g is gravitational field strength. Weight depends only on these two factors. The colour of an object has no physical effect on its weight. Mass, gravitational field strength, and altitude (which affects g) all influence weight, but colour does not.
